caption: The video appears to be a segment from a political news program titled "Plus Politics" on PlusTV, focusing on Nigerian politics. The host, dressed in a suit and tie, is seated in a studio with a backdrop featuring a world map and the show's logo. On the right side of the screen, there is an inset image of Olusola Oyekanmi, identified as a political analyst from Lagos, who is participating via phone. The topic being discussed seems to revolve around a statement made by Bola Tinubu, indicated by the text "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu" displayed at the bottom of the screen. The overall setting suggests a professional and informative discussion on current political issues in Nigeria.
